Murielle, I just heard that Sofia is sick and cannot run the interviews tomorrow.
Oh no. That is a problem. Who will lead the panel?
Do not worry. I will step in and lead the panel myself.
That is a relief. Will you confirm the room and notify the candidates?
Yes. I will confirm the room this afternoon, and I will notify the candidates promptly. I promise I will not cancel anything.
Thank you. And if a candidate does not show up?
I will reassure the team and reschedule quickly. I guarantee we will cope well; we are reliable.
Perfect. I will send you the final list tonight.
I guarantee the team will cope well.

Hi Murielle, it's Ethan. I just heard that Sofia is sick and cannot run the interviews tomorrow. Do not worry, I will handle it. I will step in and lead the panel myself. I will confirm the room this afternoon, and I will notify the candidates right away. I promise I will not cancel anything. If you need extra support, just call me and I will come. I am reliable, and I will make sure everything runs smoothly. I will send you a short update tonight. Talk soon.

Good morning, Murielle. This is Diana from London. I want to reassure you about the audit next week. We are ready. I will arrange the documents today, and I will confirm the schedule with the directors. I guarantee that the team will cope well with the pressure. If a problem appears, I will notify you promptly. I will not leave you alone with this. I think the auditors will be satisfied, because we always prepare carefully. I will remind everyone about the meeting tomorrow morning. Thank you, and I will call you soon.
